experiment: F-IC1 FP rate regression test at N=862
method: Run correction_propagation.py at N=862, sample 6/17 flagged gaps for manual classification audit. Compare FP rate to L-885 baselines (pre-fix 60%, post-fix <10%).
expect: FP rate <10% at N=862. Total gaps <15. HIGH-priority genuinely content-dependent >=80%. Self-declaration guard prevents regex-only false positives.

misclassified_items.reason: Links: metadata line not stripped by _classify_citation_type
Links: metadata line not stripped by _classify_citation_type

diff: Total gaps 17 > predicted 15 (minor). HIGH FP rate 0% CONFIRMED. Classification accuracy 67% — 2 misclassifications from Links: metadata line bug. Both were false UPGRADES (citation_only→structural), not false DOWNGRADES. No content-dependent false positives. Bug fixed: added Links: stripping to _classify_citation_type.
tool_fix_applied: correction_propagation.py line 238: added 'Links:' to metadata stripping in _classify_citation_type. Post-fix: 0 structural, 0 content-dependent, 17 citation-only.
next: N=1000 retest when corpus reaches milestone. Mini-council adversary trial (F-IC1 open item 1).
